title: Together Forever
description: A chained together challenge mod that binds players, causing shared inventory, and shared health/hunger.
body:
![Chaining together in a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vE0nYc6Y/images/f74511fb653bc31bd3fb46096091d5fe08d2b245.png)
# Together Forever 🔗❤️
> Survival is better when you're stuck together.

Together Forever is a Minecraft mod that binds players together in a struggle for survival. Once chained, you and your partners become a single organism: you share movement, health, hunger, and even your inventory. If one of you eats, everyone is fed. If one of you dies, everyone dies.

Perfect for cooperative challenges, "Soul Link" playthroughs, or just chaotic fun with friends.

## Features

### 🔗 Chain Physics

Players are physically tethered together. If you run too far apart, the chain will pull you back together with spring-like physics. You have to move as a unit to succeed.

* **Climb the chain** by holding space!

### ❤️ Shared Vitality (Health & Hunger)

- Damage is Shared
- Healing is Shared
- Hunger is Shared

### 🎒 Shared Inventory

- One Inventory: Every player in the chain shares the same inventory, armor slots, and offhand.
- Instant Sync: Picking up an item gives it to everyone. Equipping armor equips it for everyone.

## 📖 How to Play

### Creating a Link

1. Craft an **[Iron Chain](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Chain)**. (Or spawn one if you wish to be chained from the start)

2. **Right-Click** another player while holding the Chain.

3. You are now bound together!

- Add more Iron Chain to lengthen the chain. Right click with a golden pickaxe to shorten the chain again.

_Note: You can chain multiple people together in a series (A-B-C)._

### Breaking a Link

1. Obtain a **[Lava Bucket](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Lava_Bucket)**.

2. **Right-Click** a player you are chained to.

3. The lava burns the chain (consuming the lava, leaving an empty bucket), and you are free.

## ⚙️ Commands & Game Rules

You can turn on or off the shared health/hunger and shared inventory with the following commands:

- `/gamerule togetherforever:share_inventory` turns on or off shared inventory
- `/gamerule togetherforever:share_vitality` turns on or off shared health and hunger
- `/gamerule togetherforever:respawn_together` turns on or off respawning together with your chain intact

**Enjoy!**
